name: F.I.L.A. S.P.A.
summary: F.I.L.A. S.p.A. (Fabbrica Italiana Lapis ed Affini) is an Italian company that manufactures and sells a wide range of art and stationery products. The company's product portfolio includes brands like Giotto, Lyra, Daler-Rowney, and Maimeri. F.I.L.A. is headquartered in Milan, Italy.
